<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band03-2_chunk010.pdf#page=10 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band03-2 p468 -->

SCHLEISSHEIM, SCHLOSS LUSTHEIM


[[File:Band03-2_chunk010_p010_img001.jpg|thumb]]


[[File:Band03-2_chunk010_p010_img002.jpg|thumb|VI Opferung der Iphigenie]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band03-2 p469 -->


SAAL UND APPARTEMENT
